changelog:
Added:
- `docs.github.com` to the GitHub network preset ([#15](https://github.com/bernd/vibepit/pull/15))
- `patch-diff.githubusercontent.com` to the GitHub network preset
- `google-ai` network preset for Google AI services

Changed:
- `vibepit update` now shows a single merged changelog covering every release you skipped, with each entry labeled by its version ([#17](https://github.com/bernd/vibepit/pull/17))

Fixed:
- Fix garbled full-screen TUI rendering (e.g. Antigravity CLI) in `up`/`connect` SSH sessions ([#16](https://github.com/bernd/vibepit/pull/16))

added.msg: `google-ai` network preset for Google AI services

changed.msg: `vibepit update` now shows a single merged changelog covering every release you skipped, with each entry labeled by its version

fixed.msg: Fix garbled full-screen TUI rendering (e.g. Antigravity CLI) in `up`/`connect` SSH sessions
